Document:
# Mana System
The Mana System (MagicEnergy) manages a character's mana pool — how much they have, how spells cost it, and how it regenerates.
## Mana Pool
The maximum mana pool size is determined by the Intelligence stat: - Base mana comes from the MagicEnergy component default - Each point of INT above the neutral value adds bonus mana - INT modifiers also affect the bonus
## Spell Costs
Each spell action defines its mana cost via the OE14ActionManaCost component:
- type: entity id: SpellFireBolt components: - type: OE14ActionManaCost cost: 10
Before the spell fires, the system checks: 1. Does the caster have a MagicEnergy component? 2. Is current mana >= spell cost? 3. If yes: deduct and cast. If no: reject.
## Regeneration
Mana regenerates over time at a fixed rate. The rate is not affected by stats in the current implementation.
## Key Files
- [mono]Content.Shared/_OE14/Magic/MagicEnergy/OE14MagicEnergyComponent.cs[/mono] - [mono]Content.Server/_OE14/Magic/OE14ActionManaCostSystem.cs[/mono]
## Content Under Construction
Full mana system documentation coming soon.
